overall.description: Gameplay footage from Batman: Arkham Knight showing the character standing on an elevated highway structure during a stormy night. The player pans the camera to survey the industrial port and neon-lit cityscape while periodically activating the green-tinted detective vision scanning mode.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway overpass with city and port views

events.description: detective vision activates, overlaying green scan lines across the scene

agents.ego_description: Batman stands stationary on the elevated highway, activating detective vision to scan for clues

entered.detail: orange-red rusted metal railings lining the edge of the elevated highway
asphalt road surface of the overpass with visible lane markings
silhouetted shipping cranes at the industrial port against the stormy sky
tall buildings illuminated with blue and orange neon lights
dark heavy storm clouds covering the night sky

segments.scene_description: Batman stands on an elevated highway overpass during a stormy night. The camera faces forward showing rusty railings in the foreground, with industrial port cranes visible in the distant left and neon-lit city buildings on the right. Detective vision activates briefly, casting green scan lines across the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial port district viewed from elevated highway

events.description: camera pans left to focus on the industrial port area

agents.ego_description: panning left to survey the industrial shipping port with cranes and warehouse structures

entered.detail: low industrial buildings and containers at the shipping port

segments.scene_description: The camera pans left to focus on the industrial port district. The rusty railings now frame the right side of the view while shipping cranes and warehouse structures dominate the center distance. The neon city lights are no longer visible as the perspective shifts entirely to the industrial zone.

events.description: camera pans back to center from the left view
detective vision activates again with a green pulse overlay

agents.ego_description: returning view to center position and reactivating detective vision scanning mode

entered.detail: tall buildings illuminated with blue and orange neon lights

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to the center position, bringing the neon city buildings back into view on the right and the industrial cranes to the left. Batman activates detective vision again, causing the scene to briefly flash with green scanning lines while observing the highway deck ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit downtown district with digital billboards

events.description: camera pans right to focus on the illuminated city buildings

agents.ego_description: panning right to observe the neon-lit cityscape, digital billboards, and modern glass towers

entered.detail: illuminated advertising screen displaying colorful graphics on a building facade
tall contemporary building with reflective glass windows and neon accents

segments.scene_description: The camera pans right to showcase the vibrant downtown district. The rusty railings now appear on the left side of the frame while neon-lit buildings and a prominent digital billboard dominate the center and right. The industrial port is no longer visible as the view focuses entirely on the modern glass towers and colorful city lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera pan across a stormy cityscape that shifts focus from a gritty industrial port to a vibrant neon downtown. It begins on an elevated highway overpass with rusty railings in the foreground, where the view encompasses both distant shipping cranes and glowing city buildings as detective vision briefly casts green scan lines across the environment. As the camera pans left, the neon lights vanish and the perspective shifts entirely toward the industrial district, framing the scene with warehouse structures and towering cranes. The view then returns to the center to re-establish the balance between the port and the city, flashing again with green scanning lines while observing the highway deck. Finally, the camera pans right to leave the industrial zone behind, focusing instead on the modern glass towers and a prominent digital billboard of the colorful downtown district.
